passages.text: You're invited into **this residency's story**. Pick what you need right now — you can reach the other paths later from the event or campaign pages.

choices.label: Learn how the game and app work
I'm ready to create my account

passages.text: **Pre-production** — Showing up early matters: share the invite, coordinate rides, offer setup or teardown, or ask the host what would help. You're part of the field before doors open.

choices.label: Show me how the app works

passages.text:
**Learn the app** — BARs are charges you metabolize into quests; the **vault** holds drafts; **vibeulons** reward showing up. When you're curious, use the wiki.

- [Glossary](/wiki/glossary)
- [Bruised Banana campaign](/wiki/campaign/bruised-banana)
- [The four moves](/wiki/moves)
**You're set.** Use the buttons below to join, see events, or step into the hub — your path stays open anytime.

ending.description: Choose an outbound step: account creation, events, or the campaign hub.
